name: NichePulse MCP Server
description: AI-powered niche scoring API. Score, compare, and validate niches for POD, digital products, and e-commerce.

tools.name: score_niche
tools.description: Score any niche on 5 dimensions: passion, buy frequency, gift potential, competition, trend

tools.name: list_niches
tools.description: List pre-scored niches from the database ranked by total score

tools.name: compare_niches
tools.description: Compare multiple niches side by side

tools.name: validate_niche
tools.description: Full validation: score + research prompts for any niche idea

pricing: Free tier: 50 score requests/month. Pro: $9/month unlimited.
